payload: {"mode": "start", "cycle_no": 1, "phase_goal": "围绕一个具体问题讨论到分歧、原因、责任和下一步明确", "project_id": "newsloop-cutover-0822", "message_body": "请围绕当前 retrospective topic 给出证据、分歧、责任或下一步，不要做 checklist 复述。", "role_identity": "manager_moderator", "trace_context": {"traceparent": "00-9e03fce1a6b3e1d7fd861125698ab114-c39f476b3d31df68-01"}, "artifact_scope": "one evidence-backed retrospective topic", "allowed_actions": ["critique", "debate", "propose", "defend", "moderate"], "output_contract": ["concrete issue discussion", "ownership", "next action"], "forbidden_actions": ["round-robin reporting", "checklist recitation", "premature summary"], "decision_authority": "manager moderates", "agent_memory_snapshot": {}, "retrospective_seconds": 35, "optimization_log_snapshot": {"combined": [], "compiled_rules": [], "human_guidance": [], "agent_generated": []}}
result: {"topic": "产品问题", "status": "started", "topic_id": "rtp-b02e16dd3e", "message_id": "9452a6c57dd945dd", "next_agents": ["tester", "editor"], "message_body": "这轮先不做礼貌性收口，只抓最值得争的点。 1. 摘要截断导致信息残缺：首屏第一条新闻摘要停在 'canc'，第二条停在 'turn 2D apps into 3'，这种非自然的断句让用户感觉系统崩溃或未加载完成，严重破坏阅读节奏。 2. 图片资源未可视化：'images=3' 仅作为文本标签存在，首屏缺乏视觉锚点，导致版面枯燥，无法体现新闻配图的价值，看起来像后台日志。 3. 分类与内容匹配度低：'Earthset' 归类为'其他'且仅有一句极短摘要，在首屏显得信息量不足，破坏了整体板块的收束感，显得像系统抓取失败的碎片。 先把其中一处讲透：谁认为它最伤成品或最拖流程，就直接拿工件说话，不要复述流程。", "retrospective_seconds": 35}
